query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Brief is clear. The cycle is already running from Session 1. Stage 3a — spawning pseudocode and test plan agents in parallel.

**Wave plan (identified from brief dependencies):**
- **Wave 1**: `infra/categories/` module split + `infra/config.rs` (foundational — everything else depends on these)
- **Wave 2**: `main.rs`, `services/status.rs`, `services/mod.rs`, `mcp/response/status.rs`, `background.rs` (all depend on Wave 1)
- **Wave 3**: `eval/profile/layer.rs`, 6 literal-removal sites, `README.md`, test updates (depend on Wave 1 helper, otherwise independent)
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Wave-Parallel Swarm: Type-Definition Waves Must Complete Before Downstream Waves Are Spawned
Wave structure for multi-component features: parallel independent components first, sequential dependents second
ADR-008: Wave Ordering and Cross-Crate Synchronization
ADR-003: Wave execution order (7 waves with compilation gates)
Two-wave delivery for compile-dependent components: Wave 1 independent interfaces, Wave 2 consuming implementations
